title: Oreinotinus pichinchensis
taxonomy: Oreinotinus pichinchensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America, specifically in Ecuador. The plant's classification within its genus is part of ongoing botanical research, and more studies are needed to determine its exact relationships. Oreinotinus pichinchensis is often placed in the subfamily Asteroideae, which is a large and diverse group within the Asteraceae family. Further classification may require additional data on its morphology, phylogeny, and genetic characteristics.
